title: Leadership | Bob Kaufman

Bob Kaufman
President, International
Bob Kaufman currently serves as President of International, bringing over two decades of global franchise and business development expertise. From 2019 to 2023, he led Global Franchise Operations at Mathnasium LLC. He previously founded and served as CEO of SpireWorks, a fast-casual restaurant concept. Earlier roles include leadership positions at The Coffee Bean & Tea Leaf and Tower Records, where he oversaw international expansion, franchise strategy and operations. Bob has worked across 50+ countries and is fluent in multiple languages. His career reflects a deep commitment to growth strategy, operational excellence, and global brand development.
